pageContext.name: Unicorn
pageContext.description: The Unicorn, a mythical creature popularized in European folklore, has captivated the human imagination for over 2,000 years. For most of that time, well into the Middle Ages, many believed them to be real. The roots of the unicorn myth date back at least as far as 400 BCE, when the Greek historian Ctesias first documented a unicorn-like animal in his writings on the region of India.  While countless works of art have been produced depicting the mythical creature, each iteration is unique and artistic.  Our Unicorn Statue is made of high-quality resin, hand painted and it is highly detailed. The design embodies elegance, class, and will be a stylish decoration for your home!
